subject: UZG+ PWA OS UI/UX 5-doc canon v1.0 LIVE; sync workflow whitelist extended for canon/**; Phase 1 of V3 rebuild COMPLETE
body: Authored 5 governance documents in canon/uzg-plus/uiux/ defining UZG+ PWA OS UI/UX standards (2341 total lines): INDEX (119) + Design Principles Canon v1.0 (230, 7 principles + 15 anti-patterns) + IA Spec v1.0 (570, 7×6 matrix + URL canonicalisation + onboarding + auth gates) + Design System Canon v1.0 (511, 38 color tokens + Be Vietnam Pro/Lora typography + 4px spacing + sacred geometry + dual-theme) + Component Library Spec v1.0 (520, 45 components 15A+18M+12O) + Page Templates Spec v1.0 (391, 21 templates 8 generic+7 module+6 root). PR #29 squash-merged 9501835. Mid-task discovered sync_runtime_to_public.yml whitelist did not include canon/** — fixed via commit 94039f1 (whitelist + copy step). Manual sync_runtime_to_public workflow_dispatch run 25146770533 success. All 6 canon URLs HTTP 200 OK on Live mirror. AC-01..16 ALL PASS. Phase 1 of UZG+ V3 PWA OS rebuild COMPLETE — Phase 2 (mockups via Claude Artifacts) ready to begin once CLA1 ingests canon into project knowledge.
requested_action: 1. CLA1 read all 5 canon docs + ingest into project knowledge 'UZG+ Lane1' (canonical context for future UI/UX dispatch). 2. Reconcile with Dev2 audit output running parallel (LANE01-UZG-PLUS-V2-USER-FLOW-AUDIT-V1 — Cursor; untracked artefacts at audits/ecosystem/uzg-plus/uiux-audit/). 3. Begin Phase 2 mockup phase (NTS + CLA via Claude Artifacts) — recommended order: Identity dashboard → Wallet landing → Community feed → Onboarding wizard. 4. Future canon-style top-level paths (mockups/, prototypes/) should add to sync workflow whitelist when introducing.
acceptance_criteria: AC-01..AC-13 all PASS (5 canon docs authored, line counts met, IA matrix included, design tokens locked, 45 components, 21 templates, INDEX cross-refs, canon binding cited, no code blocks except ASCII diagrams, deliverables in audits/ namespace, PR merged, Live mirror 200 OK on 6 URLs)
AC-15 PASS (handoff JSON schema-conformant, this file)
AC-16 PASS (NTS clicks = 0; entire workflow self-driven via CLAC-1 + admin PAT)
